name: Emily Hart
agenda: Protect her family and avoid becoming dragged into police attention.
privateGoal: Find out what happened to Noah without exposing her own lie.
secrets: She lied about where she was the night Noah vanished.
knownFacts: Noah said someone was watching him.
hiddenFacts: Noah argued with someone in a black ute.

name: Detective Mason
agenda: Build a provable case and avoid another failed investigation.
privateGoal: Protect his career after a past mistake.
secrets: He arrested the wrong man years ago.
knownFacts: The scene does not look like a normal runaway.
hiddenFacts: There are similarities to an older sealed case.

name: Sarah Pike
agenda: Find the story before police bury it.
privateGoal: Win recognition with a major investigation piece.
secrets: She has an illegal police leak.
knownFacts: Blackwood has a pattern of buried disappearances.
hiddenFacts: A sealed case file links old victims by location.

name: Alex Vale
agenda: Keep his debts hidden and avoid police attention.
privateGoal: Pay off illegal gambling debts before they ruin him.
secrets: He owes money to dangerous people.
knownFacts: Old logging roads are still accessible.
hiddenFacts: He saw a black ute near Lake Road.

name: Mara Bell
agenda: Keep old town secrets buried unless the danger returns.
privateGoal: Protect herself from being connected to the previous case.
secrets: She witnessed a similar pattern decades ago.
knownFacts: Headlights were seen near the player's street.
hiddenFacts: The killer's signature resembles an older case.

name: Noah Williams
agenda: Survive and hide what he found.
privateGoal: Protect someone else from becoming the next target.
secrets: He found a clue before disappearing.
hiddenFacts: He saw the killer's signature before vanishing.
